policy: Only verified manga-scale beats enter the runnable contract; named techniques are ordered inside the real fight window.

scenes.outcome_claim: Luffy unveils Gear Second, overwhelms Blueno's Iron Body and Door-Door evasions with Jet attacks, and wins with the double-palm finish.
visual_variant_notes: pre-timeskip Luffy with compact Gear Second steam
Blueno's horn-shaped hair and formal CP9 clothing remain readable at globe scale
Door-Door power uses pale-blue opaque portal geometry
scenes.integration_note: The local Gear Second voice clip belongs on the activation event, before the first Jet strike.

scenes.outcome_claim: Sanji counters Jabra's wolf-form Iron Body style, ignites Diable Jambe for the first time, and finishes the fight with the flaming kick sequence.
visual_variant_notes: Sanji keeps his Enies Lobby black suit and fights only with kicks
the first three poses stay flame-free so Diable Jambe visibly debuts mid-scene
Jabra remains a braided wolf-human hybrid rather than a generic werewolf
scenes.integration_note: The local Diable Jambe clip belongs on the ignition event, not at scene start.

scenes.outcome_claim: Zoro answers Kaku's giraffe-hybrid Four-Sword Style and Tempest Kicks by manifesting Asura and ending the fight with his nine-sword strike.
visual_variant_notes: Zoro wears the black bandana and all three swords stay visually distinct
Asura uses a violet-black spiritual silhouette to suggest three heads and nine swords
Kaku's square nose, long giraffe neck, formal CP9 clothes and paired swords stay readable
scenes.integration_note: The existing Zoro Santoryu clip can lead the Asura manifestation while the generated SFX carries the sword impact.

scenes.outcome_claim: Luffy fights Rob Lucci through Gear Second and Gear Third escalation, survives the Rokuogan pressure, and defeats Lucci with the final Jet Gatling barrage.
visual_variant_notes: Gear Second steam is compact and opaque for atlas use
Gear Third appears before the finishing barrage
Jet Gatling must read as repeated two-arm fists rather than one stretched punch
Lucci uses his leopard-human hybrid form and holds a non-graphic defeat state
scenes.integration_note: The existing Gatling prototype audio belongs on the Jet Gatling event here, not on the single-punch Don Krieg scene.
